problem id: a0d317ce
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  10001111 -> 00111101
  01110101 -> 11010100
  11001011 -> 00101101
  01111010 -> 11101000
  11010000 -> 01000001
  10011010 -> 01101001
  11110001 -> 11000101
  11011111 -> 01111101

query: 01001000
predicted answer: 00100000
